zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Hampton於1185年出生在英國爾。他和Martha至少有1個女兒。他去世於1220年在他的家鄉享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Hampton于1185年出生在英国爾。他和Martha至少有1个女儿。他去世于1220年在他的家乡享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hampton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Hampton, including the cities of Southampton and Northampton (both of which were originally simply Hamtun). These all share the final Old English element tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’, but the first is variously hām ‘homestead’, hamm ‘water meadow’, or hēan, weak dative case (originally used after a preposition and article) of hēah ‘high’. This surname is also found in Ireland, having first been taken there in the medieval period.

History: The descendants of the clergyman Thomas Hampton, resident at Jamestown, VA, in 1630, lived in VA through three generations, multiplying their homesteads as the colony expanded and then branched into SC. This very common English name was brought independently to North America by many other bearers.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Hampton was born in 1185, in Cheshire, England. He had at least 1 daughter with Martha. He died in 1220, in his hometown, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Hampton est né en 1185, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Martha. Il est décédé en 1220, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Hampton wurde 1185 in Cheshire, England geboren. Er hatte mit Martha mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1220 im Alter von 35 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Hampton è nato il nel 1185 nel Cheshire, England. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Martha. Morì nel 1220, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Hamptonは1185年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた。彼はMarthaとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1220年に故郷で35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Hampton(은)는 1185년 영국 체실르에서 태어났다. 그는 Martha(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1220년 그의 고향에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Hampton nasceu em 1185, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Martha. Ele faleceu em 1220, em sua cidade natal, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Hampton родился в 1185 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Martha. Он умер в 1220 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Hampton nació en 1185, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Martha. Murió en 1220, en su pueblo, a la edad de 35 años.
